title: Inginocchiati straniero... I cadaveri non fanno ombra!
original_title: Inginocchiati straniero... I cadaveri non fanno ombra!
overview: Lazar, a bounty killer, teams up with a young gunfighter to blackmail Barrett, a former bandit and mine owner. At the end of the day, the bounty hunter clashes with Barrett, but something goes wrong.
